the first part of a novel starring a sweet young toon girl named pizzelle, a local donut-maker. pizzelle's donut shop rarely, if ever, gets customers, but she always makes enough to feed a dozen people every day just in case she happens to get a sudden influx. the plot of the short follows pizzelle in her realization that her overabundance of donuts presents a problem: she has nobody to give her extra supply to, and if they aren't eaten soon, they'll spoil. but she also doesn't want to throw away so many, perfectly fine donuts, so she resorts to a third option; eating all of them herself, becoming incredibly and attractively overweight in doing so. the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword
